title: HORDI diamondback moth + looper control regime for cabbage
body: HORDI's recommended rotation for the two dominant lepidopteran pests on Sri Lankan cabbage is: for diamondback moth (Plutella xylostella) — Emamectin benzoate 5% SG at 8 g per 16 L water, or Chlorantraniliprole 200 g/L SC at 6 ml per 16 L; for cabbage looper (Trichoplusia ni) — Spinosad 25 g/L SC at 16 ml per 16 L, or Tebufenozide 200 g/L SC at 24 ml per 16 L. Alternating modes of action between applications is essential because diamondback moth develops resistance extremely quickly to single-MOA spray programmes.
quote: Diamond back moth – Emamectin benzoate 5% SG: 8g/16L; Chlorantraniliprole 200g/L SC: 6ml/16L. Cabbage looper – Spinosad 25g/L SC: 16ml/16L; Tebufenozide 200g/L SC: 24ml/16L.
